mapper.sql: id, prof_name, prof_desc, prof_status, institute_name, institute_branch_name, is_delete, order_profe_name, version, create_time, last_access_time
mapper.select: select from t_profession where prof_name = #{proName} and institute_name = #{instituteName} and institute_branch_name = #{instituteBranchName} and is_delete = 1
mapper.insert:
insert into t_profession
id,
prof_name,
prof_desc,
prof_status,
institute_name,
institute_branch_name,
is_delete,
orderProfeName,
version,
create_time,
last_access_time
#{id,jdbcType=INTEGER},
#{profName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{profDesc,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{profStatus,jdbcType=INTEGER},
#{instituteName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{instituteBranchName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{isDelete,jdbcType=INTEGER},
#{orderProfeName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{version,jdbcType=INTEGER},
#{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
#{lastAccessTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
mapper.update: update t_profession set is_delete = 0 where id = #{id,jdbcType=INTEGER}
mapper.select: select from t_profession where id = #{id} and is_delete = 1
mapper.update: update t_profession set prof_name = #{profName}, prof_desc = #{profDesc}, institute_name = #{instituteName}, institute_branch_name = #{instituteBranchName} where id = #{id}
update t_profession set prof_status = #{status} where id = #{id}
